title: Oreganized
description:
Oreganized is a mod that adds two new metals to minecraft, Lead, Silver, and the alloy Electrum.

All with their unique uses and abilities and not just a new meaningless toolset.
body:
![Rebound update banner](https://imgur.com/QymDgVF.png)
![Oreganized Line](https://imgur.com/HAtKIrt.png)
[![akliz ad](https://i.imgur.com/aD9X866.png)](https://www.akliz.net/galena)
![Oreganized Line](https://imgur.com/HAtKIrt.png)

## 📖 About:
Oreganized is a mod inspired by the 1.17 inclusion of Copper in minecraft and imagines how would 2 new metals look like if they were added today. Each with their unique niches and themes. Silver and Lead! Silver can be made into Mirrors, Scribe, Gargoyles and make a new alloy called Electrum. Lead can be used for decoration, melted and for Lead Bolts - new projectiles! The world is also filled with an adjacent features to the metals like the new Boulders which you can find in plains that are the source of a new stone type(as well as maybe more if you wash it ;))

![Oreganized Line](https://imgur.com/HAtKIrt.png)

# THIS MOD REQUIRES [BLUEPRINT](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint)

![Oreganized Line](https://imgur.com/HAtKIrt.png)

## 🎞️ Compatibility:

[Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) - Spiky bomb made from shrapnel bomb or sold by Red Merchant

[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) - Electrum Knife

[Shield Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/shield-expansion) - Electrum Shield

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - Crushed Silver, Crushed Lead, Molten Lead shenanigans

![Oreganized Line](https://imgur.com/HAtKIrt.png)
